positive: A minimalist, highly stylized depiction of a cosmic mountain range floating in a deep indigo nebula. The mountain peaks are rendered in crisp, geometric white and gold lines, creating a striking silhouette against the vibrant, pastel gradient background of purple, turquoise, and magenta. The style is clean linocut meets Art Nouveau, emphasizing strong contrast and elegant curves. Include subtle, stylized constellations formed by dotted gold lines, suggesting depth and mystery. The composition must be perfectly balanced, suitable for a central chest print on an apparel item, ensuring maximum visual impact and print clarity. --ar 1:1
